headline: VHT Lagged the Market by 57 Points Over 5 Years. Here Is Why Long-Term Investors Still Hold It
summary: Healthcare spending doesn’t stop during recessions. That structural reality is the core argument for owning Vanguard Health Care ETF (NYSEARCA:VHT), a pure-play sector fund that has quietly compounded wealth for long-term investors while offering insulation from economic cycles that most equity sectors can’t match. What VHT Is Actually Built to Do VHT tracks the MSCI ... VHT Lagged the Market by 57 Points Over 5 Years. Here Is Why Long-Term Investors Still Hold It

summary: Why UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Is Back on Investors’ Radar UnitedHealth Group (UNH) has drawn fresh attention after a period of weak share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month, the past 3 months, year to date, and over the past year. headline: Mark Cuban Calls $30,000 Corporate Healthcare Burden 'Insane,' Backs Bill To Break Up Big Medicine Giants UNH, CVS, CI
summary: Billionaire entrepreneur Mark Cuban is sounding the alarm on skyrocketing corporate healthcare costs, declaring them a primary driver of layoffs and throwing his full weight behind bipartisan legislation to dismantle healthcare conglomerates like UnitedHealth Group Inc., CVS Health Corp., and Cigna Group. headline: Sanas Broadens Real‑Time Speech AI Platform for Global Enterprises
summary: Sanas, the Speech AI Platform built for enterprise communication, today announced the launch of Real-Time Language Translation alongside a major upgrade to Speech Enhancement. Together, these capabilities advance Sanas' evolution from an accent tool into a full-scale speech ecosystem helping enterprises communicate without barriers.

headline: UnitedHealthcare Introduces AI Companion Empowering People with Simpler Navigation, Personal Experience
summary: March 26, 2026--UnitedHealthcare today introduced Avery, a generative AI companion that creates a simpler, more coordinated health care experience for members while empowering customer advocates to more efficiently respond to members.

headline: British Airways to reward pilots for cutting fuel as airlines tackle higher costs
summary: Jet fuel prices surged about 106% compared to a month ago, according to data from the week ending March 20 via the International Air Transport Association.

headline: 1 Mega-Cap Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Question
summary: Megacap stocks dominate their sectors and their actions influence economies worldwide. The flip side though is that their sheer size means they have less room for explosive growth as scale works against them.
